channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CEO says anyone who works from home is grabbing groceries or at the vet 30% of the time—and shows off his busy office at Friday 5 p.m. to prove it
item.description: “I’m a big believer in working in office,” the founder said. “If you don’t like that, well go run your own company.”

item.title: Buried in SpaceX’s IPO: a Tesla merger clue and a $3.75 billion insider windfall for friends and family
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: A single new sentence in SpaceX’s amended IPO filing could signal the biggest merger in history
item.description: A SpaceX-Tesla merger could be the endgame.

item.title: These COOs became CEOs. Here’s what they wish everyone knew about the tricky transition
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.
